name: search-engine-optimization
description: End-to-end SEO workflow: keyword research, SERP intent, competitor gap, content briefs, on-page, internal linking, schema, technical audit, backlinks, rank tracking, reporting, and AI search — as skills + agents. Brand context is loaded per-project at runtime.

semrush_api_key.title: Semrush API key
semrush_api_key.description: Your Semrush API key, used by the bundled Semrush MCP server. Leave blank to run without live Semrush data (skills fall back to web search where possible).
